commit.subject: LU-8955 mdt: check SELinux policy from client for metadata op
commit.message:
LU-8955 mdt: check SELinux policy from client for metadata op

Get SELinux policy info from nodemap and compare it to the one
received from client for metadata operations.

Signed-off-by: Sebastien Buisson <sbuisson@ddn.com>
Change-Id: I18b93378ea2b9c302a3842b160c0d5a85cc28da4
